page_metadata.biotools__summary: StSNP (Structure SNP) is a server which provides the ability to analyze and compare human nonsynonymous SNPs (nsSNP) in protein structures, protein complexes, protein-protein interfaces and metabolic networks.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: StSNP (Structure SNP) is a server which provides the ability to analyze and compare human nonsynonymous SNPs (nsSNP) in protein structures, protein complexes, protein-protein interfaces and metabolic networks.
